summary: The phone call transcript indicates a critical application error message was delivered to the user, resulting in an abrupt termination of the call. This suggests a failure in the system's ability to handle errors gracefully and provide a better user experience.

issues.evidence: The message 'An application error has occurred.' was stated.
issues.why_it_matters: This indicates a significant failure in the application, which can lead to user frustration and loss of trust in the service.
issues.suggestion: Implement a more user-friendly error handling mechanism that provides additional information or options to the user instead of terminating the call.

issues.why_it_matters: Ending the call without further assistance can leave users feeling unsupported and dissatisfied.
issues.suggestion: Consider providing alternative options or a follow-up message to guide users on what to do next after an error occurs.
